Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'NM' AND (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1, 2) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 2)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/f86e372d75140a2e62ef1b960e44080a4442eefa6e654a52bd860086b01c783a/d6b6a288-b3ee-4f78-a80b-eefe41832301/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
